MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-25-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S, DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $390. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE PRO TEM: THOMAS A. COHEN; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S, DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Discovery; and for Award of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED.
Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $390. No opposition was filed. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
